owner.evidence: Exact owner/model review passed after 101 tests plus one expected live skip. It verified accurate production Poisson and zero-weight shadow Dixon-Coles representation, nested chronological folds, paired-bootstrap uncertainty, public/restricted odds separation, and truthful zero-eligible-close profitability blocking.

replication_1.evidence: Independent replication rebuilt corrected public and restricted datasets deterministically. Both 142,349-row public CSVs match SHA-256 3faae9c180ee1eeb0702aaca924877f9983bb0d09431410f349a15d1bf935033; 1,311 restricted rows remain private; all 38 restricted fixtures reconcile to public IDs; 13 historical tests passed.

replication_2.evidence: Independent source/statistics audit verified UK-local DST conversion, full 38-fixture cross-provider ID reconciliation, zero quarter-handicap settlement mismatches, 25 public plus 2 restricted source descriptors, zero malformed prices, no restricted rows in public CSV, Pinnacle staleness warnings, and zero primary-eligible closes.

editor.evidence: Exact visualization/editor audit verified distinct solid production and dashed research diagrams, JSON-matched production/shadow/fold/bootstrap metrics, 8,908-event and 142,349-row public coverage, explicit unvalidated ROI/CLV, full Spanish localization, mobile bounds, reduced motion, accessibility, and 18 browser tests.
